title: United States Visa Policy
description: Official visa policy and immigration regulations for the United States of America.
content: The United States maintains a complex visa system that categorizes visitors based on their purpose of travel. The policy outlines requirements for various visa types, visa waiver programs, and immigration procedures.

entryRequirements.title: General Entry Requirements
entryRequirements.description: All visitors to the United States must meet basic entry requirements regardless of visa type.
requirements: Valid passport with at least six months validity beyond intended stay
Completed visa application (if required)
Payment of applicable fees
Clear intent to depart the US at the end of authorized stay

visaTypes.description: For tourism, vacation, visiting family/friends, or medical treatment
requirements: Proof of residence abroad
Evidence of strong ties to home country
Proof of sufficient funds for stay
Detailed itinerary of planned activities
process: Schedule visa interview at US Embassy/Consulate

visaTypes.description: For business consultations, conferences, estate settlement, or negotiating contracts
requirements: Letter from employer detailing purpose of trip
Proof of business ties to home country
Evidence of sufficient funds
Invitation from US-based company (if applicable)
process: Schedule visa interview at US Embassy/Consulate

visaTypes.description: For academic studies or vocational training
requirements: Acceptance from SEVP-certified school
Proof of financial support for entire stay
Proof of residence abroad
Completed Form I-20 from school
process: Receive Form I-20 from SEVP-certified school
Receive visa and travel to US

immigrationRules.title: Visa Waiver Program (VWP)
immigrationRules.description: Citizens of participating countries may travel to the US for tourism or business for stays of 90 days or less without obtaining a visa.
rules: Must hold valid e-passport with electronic chip
Must have approved ESTA authorization prior to travel
Stay limited to 90 days per visit
Not extendable or convertible to another visa status
Must travel with approved carrier (if arriving by air or sea)

immigrationRules.title: Length of Stay Extensions
immigrationRules.description: Procedures for extending authorized stay in the United States.
rules: Must file extension request before current authorized stay expires
Must not have violated terms of admission
Extension granted at discretion of USCIS

title: Canada Visa Policy
description: Official visa policy and immigration regulations for Canada.
content: Canada offers various visa programs for tourists, students, workers, and immigrants. The policy includes information about visitor visas, study permits, work permits, and permanent residence pathways.

entryRequirements.title: General Entry Requirements
entryRequirements.description: Basic requirements for entering Canada as a temporary resident.
requirements: Valid travel document (passport)
Good health
No criminal or immigration-related convictions
Proof of ties to home country
Proof that you will leave Canada at the end of your visit
Proof of sufficient funds for your stay

visaTypes.description: For tourism, visiting family/friends, or short-term studies (less than 6 months)
requirements: Proof of ties to home country
Proof of sufficient funds for stay
Letter of invitation from Canadian host (if applicable)
Purpose of trip explanation
process: Determine if you need a visa
Submit application to Visa Application Centre

visaTypes.description: For academic, professional, or vocational training at designated learning institutions
requirements: Letter of acceptance from designated learning institution
Proof of sufficient funds for tuition and living expenses
Proof of no criminal record
Medical exam (if required)
Proof that you will leave Canada when permit expires
process: Get letter of acceptance from DLI
Apply for study permit online or at visa office
Travel to Canada with introduction letter

immigrationRules.title: Electronic Travel Authorization (eTA)
immigrationRules.description: Entry requirement for visa-exempt foreign nationals flying to or transiting through Canada.
rules: Required for visa-except foreign nationals flying to or transiting through Canada
Not required for US citizens or travelers with valid Canadian visa
Valid for up to five years or until passport expires
Most applicants get approved within minutes

immigrationRules.title: Biometrics Requirement
immigrationRules.description: Most applicants need to give fingerprints and photo (biometrics) after applying.
rules: Required for applicants from Europe, Middle East, Africa, Asia, Asia Pacific and Americas
Costs CAD $85 per person or CAD $170 per family
Collected at official Visa Application Centres
